description: A kind of culminating project a student can pursue, such as Thesis, Summative Paper, or Doctrinal Statement. Set up one per option to define its milestone schedule and the course that carries its credits, grade, and fees; a student's project of this type enrolls them in that course.

fields.description: The course code that carries this project type's credits, grading scale (via its Course Schedule) and fees. Configure per seminary and ensure the course belongs to programs; leave blank until the course exists.
fields.label: Backing Course

fields.description: When on, projects of this type inherit the reader composition below: each reader slot's type is fixed and reader selection is validated against the unit rules. When off, staff pick reader types and members freely per project.
fields.label: Apply Policy to Reader Selection

fields.description: When on, the Assign Advisor picker is limited to instructors who are members of the project's Academic Unit (same scoping as readers). Turn off to let a dean or outside advisor step in.
fields.label: Advisor from Project's Academic Unit

fields.description: How many named readers (beyond the advisor) this project carries. A project has at most two (Second and Third Reader); put any further reviewers on the committee.
fields.label: Readers Required

fields.description: Whether the Second Reader is an internal Instructor or an External Examiner.
fields.label: Second Reader Type

fields.description: Allow a Second Reader from outside the project's Academic Unit. Off = must be a member of the project's unit.
fields.label: Allow Instructors from Other Units

fields.description: Whether the Third Reader is an internal Instructor or an External Examiner.
fields.label: Third Reader Type

fields.description: Allow a Third Reader from outside the project's Academic Unit. Off = must be a member of the project's unit.
fields.label: Allow Instructors from Other Units

fields.description: Ordered milestone template for this project type. Snapshotted onto each project when it is activated; due dates are computed from each milestone's anchor + offset. A Defense is just a milestone with kind 'Defense' and its required sign-offs.
fields.label: Milestones

name: Culminating Project Type
